visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a hand wearing a dark green smartwatch, pushing blue-and-white mahjong tiles into the circular opening of an electric mahjong table. A large 'Costco Wholesale' logo and promotional text are overlaid. (2) The scene shifts to a price tag showing '19,999' for an 'EASTKING MAHJONG TABLE'. A hand indicates the table's surface. (3) The central panel of the table rises, revealing a square arrangement of green-and-white mahjong tiles being pushed upward into place. A person in a grey patterned sweater is visible. (4) A second price tag is shown, this time for '25,999' for a 'Four-Wing Second Generation' model. A hand presses a button on the central hub, which has a glowing blue ring. (5) The central panel of the more expensive table rises and falls with a smoother, tilted motion. A person in a pink sweater and another in a blue sleeve are visible interacting with the table. (6) The camera zooms in on the side features of the table, showing a sliding drawer for chips, a fold-out cup holder, and a small panel labeled with a USB icon for charging.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 過年神器, 電動麻將桌 19,999. (2) [Subtitle]: 很大聲, 所以這個是便宜. [Slogan]: 19,999. (3) [Subtitle]: 對對對. [Slogan]: 19,999. (4) [Subtitle]: 對, 然後他是. [Variety]: 直上直下的!. (5) [Subtitle]: 也太快了吧, 怎麼這麼快. (6) [Subtitle]: 有兩副牌對不對. (7) [Subtitle]: 拿他下一代一下. (8) [Subtitle]: 高級的, 對, 這個沒有聲音. [Variety]: 25,999. (9) [Subtitle]: 我們來看看聲音差別. (10) [Subtitle]: 正在洗牌對不對. [Variety]: 啊好帥, 是斜著上來耶. (11) [Subtitle]: 放籌碼的地方, 還有置杯架. (12) [Subtitle]: 而且四角都有飲料架. (13) [Subtitle]: 然後還有充電USB, 你的桌台還可以充電. [Variety]: 還有USB充電.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One male and one female character identified by clothing and hand appearance.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One person wearing a grey/black patterned sweater and a green smartwatch; another person wearing a pink sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring industrial shelving, cardboard boxes, and retail price tags on pillars.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A series of sharp, percussive clacking sounds of mahjong tiles hitting each other dominates the audio. A male voice speaks in a friendly, conversational tone about the price and volume of the table. Upbeat acoustic guitar music plays at a steady tempo in the background. (2) A new phase is triggered by a sudden high-pitched mechanical whirring sound as the table's mechanism moves. A female voice expresses excitement with rising intonation and high arousal. (3) The clacking of tiles ceases, replaced by a much softer, lower-frequency humming sound of a motor. The male voice notes the lack of noise, speaking with moderate pitch and clear articulation. (4) A metallic click and the sound of a sliding drawer occur. The female voice continues to narrate the features like the cup holder and USB port, maintaining a bright and enthusiastic tone as the background music continues steadily.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Comparison: Hook -> Feature Demo A -> Price Contrast -> Feature Demo B -> Detail Showcase
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and compare two different models of electric mahjong tables available at Costco, emphasizing the value proposition of the cheaper model versus the advanced features and quiet operation of the more expensive one.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase with prices and clear brand logos shown within a retail environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical short-form social media editing with heavy subtitling and sound effects to maintain engagement during a product demonstration.
